title: Sri Gandhada Gudi
subTitle: Chandana marries into a family with a troubled past in order to escape her fate. However, can she restore the family's hope?

subTitle: Vidya's dream of becoming a doctor is threatened when her father decides to get her married. Unfortunately, her father-in-law also believes that women should not pursue education.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Karthikeya, with his powerful spear in hand, commands the army of Devas to face Tarakasura and his legion of Asuras. How will the battle unfold between the Devas and Asuras?

title: Shantam Paapam
subTitle: A father with three children is biased in favour of his son over his daughters. As a result, an intense sibling rivalry arises with the potential for tragic consequences.

subTitle: Two sisters, Prema and Kavya, are pushed into marriages they don't want. However, they struggle with love and lies as they seek happiness in their relationships.

subTitle: A photographer named Arun befriends Rajashekhara, a wealthy but lonely man who has resorted to drinking to quell his pain. Soon, Arun agrees to help him reunite with his estranged family.

title: Pavada Purusha
subTitle: With the family fasting all day on Sundara's insistence, Mayappa is infuriated by it. The family also cannot break the fast until a visitor visits the house and eats the food prepared by them. Will Sundara be able to calm down a hungry Mayappa?

title: Pavada Purusha
subTitle: Balu is enraged at Lord Vitthal as nobody has visited their house to eat food and thus, his family cannot break their fast. A boy enters the village and visits Balu's house. Who is this boy, and will he eat food at Balu's house?
